fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of activity that the warehouse performed on the lines attached to the header, such as put-away, pick or movement.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location in which the registered warehouse activity occurred.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.

fields.name: Assignment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Assignment Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Sorting Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method by which the lines were sorted on the warehouse header, such as by item, or bin code.

fields.name: Registering Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the line is registered.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Whse. Activity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warehouse activity number from which the activity was registered.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.
